name: Avaamo: IT Helpdesk Agent

parameters.subject: =🔐 Password Reset - {{ $json.system }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.userName }},

Your password has been reset for {{ $json.system }}.

🔑 Temporary Password: {{ $json.resolution.tempPassword }}
⏰ Expires in: {{ $json.resolution.expiry }}

Please login and change your password immediately.

If you didn't request this, contact IT Security.

Best,
IT Helpdesk Agent

=✅ Auto-Resolved: Password Reset

User: {{ $json.userName }} ({{ $json.userEmail }})
System: {{ $json.system }}
Action: Temporary password generated
Status: RESOLVED automatically

parameters.subject: =🎫 IT Request Received - {{ $json.system }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.userName }},

We've received your IT request:
{{ $json.details }}

Status: Awaiting manager approval
Ticket: #IT-{{ Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000) }}

Your manager has been notified. You'll receive an update within 1 hour.

Best,
IT Helpdesk Agent

description: Avaamo: IT Helpdesk Agent - Auto-resolves common issues, requests approval for sensitive actions
